# erdmini

> Free, open-source, browser-based Entity-Relationship Diagram (ERD) tool. No sign-up required. Design database schemas visually and export DDL for multiple dialects.

erdmini runs entirely in the browser with zero server dependency (local storage mode). It also supports a self-hosted server mode with SQLite, Docker, authentication, and real-time collaboration.

## Core Features

- Visual drag-and-drop ERD canvas with zoom, pan, minimap, and grid snap
- Table and column CRUD with primary keys, foreign keys, indexes, and domains
- DDL export and import for MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, and MSSQL
- Diagram export to Mermaid, PlantUML, SVG, and PNG
- Auto-layout: grid, hierarchical, and radial (force-directed) algorithms
- Undo/redo history with visual timeline
- Schema linting (8 rules) and schema diff comparison
- Multi-select, rubber band selection, group drag, align and distribute
- URL-based schema sharing (compressed, no server needed)
- Internationalization: English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese
- 4 themes: modern, classic, blueprint, minimal (each with dark mode)

## Server Mode Features

- Self-hosted with Docker and SQLite storage
- Local authentication + multi-OIDC provider support
- User roles and project permissions (owner/editor/viewer)
- Real-time collaboration via WebSocket with presence cursors

## Supported DDL Dialects

- MySQL
- PostgreSQL
- MariaDB
- Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL)

## Links

- [Live App](https://dornol.github.io/erdmini): Use erdmini directly in your browser
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/dornol/erdmini): Source code and documentation

## Technical Stack

- SvelteKit + Svelte 5 (runes) + Tailwind CSS v4
- TypeScript, Vite, pnpm
- Canvas: HTML div + CSS transform (not SVG-based)
- State management: Svelte 5 $state in reactive module classes
